Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Docker base image from OpenJDK 17 to OpenJDK 21 to align with the Java version migration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to Java 21; running it on a JDK 17 base image would result in runtime errors due to missing or incompatible class files (e.g., if using Java 21-specific features or if the build produces a JAR requiring JDK 21).

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add a missing newline at the end of the Dockerfile to comply with POSIX standards and linter requirements.
Dockerfile.before: EXPOSE 8081\n\ No newline at end of file

Jenkinsfile.general_idea: Update the Jenkins build agent label to target a Java 21 environment instead of Java 17.

descriptors/ModuleDescriptor-template.js.general_idea: Update the _tenant interface version to 2.0 to align with the FOLIO platform's module descriptor schema requirements for Java 21 compatible modules.
descriptors/ModuleDescriptor-template.js.why_exists: Module registration fails or is rejected by the FOLIO platform if the _tenant interface version is outdated or incompatible with the current platform expectations.

descriptors/ModuleDescriptor-template.js.general_idea: Add new provides interfaces for ECS request external, pick slips, search slips, and external users to expose new API endpoints.
Add new provides interfaces for loans (check-in/check-out) and requests (allowed service points, search instances, post request, confirm mediated request).

Add required dependencies for pick-slips, search-slips, search, consortium-search, user-tenants, users, login, permissions, item-storage, holdings-storage, locations, location-units, service-points, material-types, circulation, circulation-settings, and instance-storage.
Add optional dependencies for tlr-staff-slips, tlr-settings, requests-mediated, ecs-request-external, requests-mediated-actions, ecs-tlr-allowed-service-points, and ecs-tlr.
Add metadata section defining system user permissions for various inventory, search, and circulation operations.

Add permission sets for new endpoints including ecs-request-external, pick-slips, search-slips, external-users, search-instances, confirm-mediated-request, requests-post, loans-check-in, and loans-check-out.
Update module permissions for existing handlers to include necessary access rights for users, tlr, circulation, and inventory services.
Update _tenant handler permissions to include users, login, and permissions management rights.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.3 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update project version to 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the new release cycle.
Set Java version property to 21 to compile and run on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or run on incorrect JDK version if not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove unused sonar exclusions and argLine properties.
Replace folio-spring-base dependency with folio-spring-support to use the updated FOLIO Spring framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact may be deprecated or incompatible with the new Spring Boot version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add folio-spring-system-user dependency for system user handling.
Add spring-boot-starter-validation dependency for bean validation support.
Add spring-boot-starter-cache dependency for caching support.
Add spring-cloud-starter-openfeign dependency for declarative REST client support.
Add mapstruct dependency for type-safe bean mapping.
Add mapstruct-processor dependency for annotation processing.
Update openapi-generator input spec file name to match new API structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build will fail if the specified input file does not exist.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update openapi-generator model package to match new package structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Generated code will be in wrong package, causing compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update openapi-generator api package to match new package structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Generated code will be in wrong package, causing compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update wiremock version to 3.12.1 for compatibility and bug fixes.
Update testcontainers version to 1.20.6 for compatibility and bug fixes.
Add newline at end of file to comply with POSIX standards.
pom.xml.before:
</project>
\ No newline at end of file

src/main/java/org/folio/circulationbff/C.general_idea: Exclude DataSourceAutoConfiguration to prevent Spring Boot from attempting to configure a database connection that is not present or desired in this module.
src/main/java/org/folio/circulationbff/C.why_exists: Spring Boot auto-configuration will fail at startup with a BeanCreationException or similar error if it tries to configure a DataSource but no JDBC driver or valid datasource properties are provided.

src/main/java/org/folio/circulationbff/C.general_idea: Enable Feign clients to allow declarative REST client usage within the application.

src/main/java/org/folio/circulationbff/c.general_idea: Replace Lombok @AllArgsConstructor with @RequiredArgsConstructor to enforce constructor injection of final fields.
Add explicit final fields for service dependencies to support constructor injection.
Implement postEcsRequestExternal endpoint to create external ECS requests.
Implement getPickSlips endpoint to fetch pick slips by service point.
Implement getSearchSlips endpoint to fetch search slips by service point.
Implement getExternalUsers endpoint to fetch external user details.
Refactor getAllowedServicePoints to use AllowedServicePointParams builder and updated service method.
Implement circulationBffRequestsSearchInstancesGet endpoint to search instances.
Implement saveAndConfirmMediatedRequest endpoint with logic for new and existing requests.
Implement createRequest endpoint to create circulation requests.
Implement checkInByBarcode endpoint for item check-in.
Implement checkOutByBarcode endpoint for item check-out.
Add exception handler for HttpFailureFeignException to forward error responses.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Exclude JDBC, Hibernate, and Transaction Manager auto-configurations to prevent startup failures due to missing database dependencies.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: Spring Boot will fail to start with a BeanCreationException or NoSuchBeanDefinitionException if it attempts to auto-configure DataSource or JPA components without the required driver and ORM libraries on the classpath.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
spring:
  application:
    name: mod-circulation-bff
  autoconfigure:
    exclude: |-
      org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.jdbc.DataSourceAutoConfiguration,
      org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.orm.jpa.HibernateJpaAutoConfiguration,
      org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.jdbc.DataSourceTransactionManagerAutoConfiguration

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Disable Liquibase to prevent initialization errors when no database connection is configured.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: Liquibase will throw a runtime exception during startup if it cannot connect to a database or if the changelog file is missing, which is expected in a stateless BFF without a local DB.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Disable Mustache template location check to allow startup without a templates directory.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: Spring Boot will fail to start if the 'templates' directory is missing and this check is enabled, which is common for API-only services.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Change Jackson property inclusion strategy from non_empty to non_null.
Add secure tenant ID configuration property.
Add system user configuration properties for authentication.
Add newline at end of file.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before: debug: false\ No newline at end of file

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet.http.Cookie with jakarta.servlet.http.Cookie to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class must be imported from jakarta.servlet.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Migrate from @WebMvcTest to @SpringBootTest with @AutoConfigureMockMvc to support full context initialization required by the new test structure.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.why_exists: Runtime failure: @WebMvcTest creates a partial context that may not initialize beans or configurations required by the new test setup (e.g., DynamicPropertySource, full service layer interactions), leading to missing bean exceptions or incorrect test behavior.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Replace @ContextConfiguration with @DynamicPropertySource to configure test properties dynamically, aligning with modern Spring Boot testing practices.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.why_exists: Runtime failure: The old static initializer approach for WireMock may not integrate correctly with Spring's property resolution in the new test context, causing connection failures or misconfigured endpoints.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Update WireMock server initialization to use findAvailableTcpPort and static block for better port management and lifecycle control.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.why_exists: Runtime failure: Hardcoded or poorly managed ports can lead to port conflicts in CI/CD environments or parallel test execution, causing connection refused errors.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Add FolioExecutionContextSetter initialization and cleanup to properly manage execution context in tests.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.why_exists: Runtime failure: Missing execution context setup can lead to null pointer exceptions or incorrect tenant/user context resolution during test execution.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Refactor defaultHeaders to use add instead of put for multi-value headers and update tenant ID handling.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.why_exists: Runtime failure: Using put for multi-value headers can overwrite existing values, leading to incorrect header transmission and authentication/tenant resolution failures.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Add setUpTenant method to initialize tenant configuration before tests run.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.why_exists: Runtime failure: Tests may fail due to missing tenant configuration, leading to 404 or 401 errors when accessing tenant-specific endpoints.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Add helper methods for HTTP requests (doPostWithTenant, doPostWithToken, buildRequest) to streamline test code.
Add asJsonString method using a configured ObjectMapper for consistent JSON serialization in tests.
Add constants for tenant IDs and user ID to improve test readability and maintainability.
Add ObjectMapper configuration for consistent JSON handling in tests.
Add imports for new dependencies and utilities used in the refactored test class.
